title: ADM 2020 Aluminum Member Design
description: Design aluminum members in accordance with ADM 2020.

s3d_section.description: Section ID. Symbol: S3D\;Section\;ID. Section object imported from S3D model.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select Custom to edit section dimensions.

welded.description: Welded. Symbol: Welded. Select welded or not welded.

B.description: Width (B). Units: in. The width of the section.

D.description: Depth (D). Units: in. The depth of the section.

t_f.description: Thickness tf. Units: in. Flange thickness, top/btm wall thickness (Rectangular Hollow Sections).

t_w.description: Thickness tw. Units: in. Web thickness, or side wall thickness (Rectangular Hollow Sections) or Hollow Circular Section thickness.

an_factor.description: Net Area Factor. Symbol: Net&nbspArea&nbspFactor. Units: %. Reduction factor for the net area of the section (including holes). 100% means the net area is equal to the section's gross area.

Lb.description: Lb. Units: in. Length between bending restraints.

Lz.description: Lz.comp. Units: in. Distance between restraints against compression buckling about the Z-axis.

Ly.description: Ly.comp. Units: in. The span of the member, as unbraced length in the Y (minor) direction.

kz.description: kz. Distance between restraints against compression buckling about the Y-axis.

ky.description: ky. Effective length coefficient for buckling about the minor Y axis.

cb_factor.description: Moment Gradient Factor (Cb). Symbol: Cb. User defined Cb factor, to be calculated to ADM 2020 Cl F.4.1.1

method.description: Design Method. Symbol: Method. ASD - Allowable Stress Design LRFD - Load Resistance Factor Design

Mrz.description: Major Bending (Md.z). Symbol: Mdz. Units: kip-ft. Design moment about major Z-axis. Positive value results in compression at top of section.

Mry.description: Minor Bending (Md.y). Symbol: Mdy. Units: kip-ft. Design moment about minor Y-axis. Positive value results in compression at the right of the section.

Vry.description: Major Shear (Vd.y). Symbol: Vdy. Units: kip. Design shear along major Y-axis.

Vrz.description: Minor Shear (Vd.z). Symbol: Vdz. Units: kip. Design shear along minor Z-axis.

Prc.description: Axial Compression (Pd.c). Symbol: Pdc. Units: kip. Design axial compression.

Prt.description: Axial Tension (Pd.t). Symbol: Pdt. Units: kip. Design axial tension.

flexure_setting.description: Bending. Symbol: Flexure&nbspMethod. Select method to use for calculation of local buckling in bending.Limiting Element - capacity is based on the lowest capacity across each individual element in the sectionWeighted Average Method - capacity is based on the weighted average capacity of each individual element across the entire section

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
